UCS-160  PRESSURE TESTING OF CARBON AND LOW ALLOY STEEL VESSELS. (a) Carbon and low alloy steel vessels shall be pressure-tested in accordance with UG-99, or when hydrostatic test is not practicable, by pneumatic test per UG-100. (b) The test temperature shall not be less than the MDMT as determined per UCS-66 plus 30 deg F. (c) If the vessel has been postweld heat-treated in accordance with UCS-79, the test shall be performed after PWHT. For proof tests, see UG-101. The test shall be witnessed by the Inspector as required by UG-93. Wall thickness at test conditions shall satisfy UG-27.
